items.label: MUSD Savings Vault
items.note: Primary V1 MUSD operating-capital sleeve. Testnet APR is demo data, not a production guarantee.

items.label: Tigris Basic Stable MUSD/mUSDC

items.label: Tigris mcbBTC/BTC
